services.description_pl: Bezinwazyjna lokalizacja wyciekow z instalacji wody zimnej, cieplej i centralnego ogrzewania.
services.description_en: Non-invasive leak detection in cold water, hot water, and central heating installations.

services.description_pl: Diagnostyka nieszczelnosci w wodnym ogrzewaniu podlogowym za pomoca termowizji i gazu znacznikowego.
services.description_en: Leak diagnostics in water-based underfloor heating using thermal imaging and tracer gas.

services.description_pl: Badanie szczelnosci hydroizolacji dachow plaskich, tarasow i balkonow metoda dymowa i wilgotnosciowa.
services.description_en: Waterproofing integrity testing for flat roofs, terraces, and balconies using smoke and moisture methods.

services.description_pl: Inspekcja rur kanalizacyjnych kamera endoskopowa oraz proby barwnikowe UV.
services.description_en: Sewage pipe inspection with endoscopic camera and UV dye tests.

services.description_pl: Profesjonalne osuszanie budynkow po zalaniach we wspolpracy z partnerami.
services.description_en: Professional building drying after floods in cooperation with trusted partners.

equipment.name: Geophone
equipment.purpose: Acoustic leak detection underground and in walls

equipment.name: Thermal imaging camera
equipment.purpose: Visualizing pipe paths and leak locations through temperature differences

equipment.name: Tracer gas detector
equipment.purpose: Detecting micro-leaks using hydrogen-nitrogen gas mixture

equipment.name: Endoscopic camera
equipment.purpose: Visual inspection of sewage and drain pipes

equipment.name: Pressure gauge
equipment.purpose: Tightness testing of water and heating installations

equipment.name: UV dye kit
equipment.purpose: Locating sewage leaks with fluorescent dye
